Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Eject Key for HU drive pressed

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

DataItem.Name: Eject Key for HU drive pressed

Request.Name: DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Software Logical Block Part Number(s) Read

Test.Description: Taste "Stummschaltung" klemmt. The button "Mute" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
'Der Audio-/COMAND-Controller hat Funktionsstörung. 'The Audio/COMAND controller has a malfunction. - ISO/SAE reserved
Es liegt ein Laufzeitfehler vor. Watchdog / Safety ?C Failure - watchdog / safety µC failure
Die Taste ''Navigation'' klemmt. Button Navigation" is jammed." - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste ''Radio'' klemmt. Button Radio" is jammed." - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste 'Media'' klemmt. Button Media is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste ''Telefon'' klemmt. Button Telephone" is jammed." - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste ''Fahrzeug'' klemmt. Button Vehicle" is jammed." - ISO/SAE reserved

Die Taste ''Betriebsmodus'' klemmt (ECO-button). The button ''Operating mode'' jammed. - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste ''Niveaueinstellung'' klemmt. The button "Level Adjustment" is jammed." - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste ''Fahrwerk in Sport-/Komfort-Stellung'' klemmt; Button Suspension to Sport/Comfort setting" is jammed." - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste "Exhaust Flap AMG" klemmt. The button "Exhaust Flap AMG" is jammed. - ISO/SAE reserved
Die "Taste Heckrollo" klemmt. The button "Rear Blind Switch" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste ' Fahrprogramm M' klemmt. The button "Vehicle Dive Program" is jammed. - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste Die Taste 'Offroad-Programm' klemmt. The button "Offroad-Program" is jammed. - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste'Bergabfahrilfe (DSR)' klemmt.The button 'Downhill Speed Regulation (DSR)' is jammed. - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste ''Kopfstütze'' klemmt. The button "Rest Head" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste "PARKTRONIC OFF" klemmt. The button ''PARKTRONIC OFF" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Der Schalter 'Fahrprogramm-Auswahl' klemmt. The button "Drive Program Select" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste 'BGA' klemmt. The button "BGA" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste "Betriebsmodus Hybrid" klemmt. The button "Operation Mode Hybrid" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die "Taste Gurbringer" klemmt. The button"Seat Belt Extender" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste "ESP® OFF" klemmt. The button "ESP® OFF" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste "CD/DVD-Auswurf" klemmt. The button "CD/DVD Eject" is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste "Favoriten" klemmt. The button "Favorite" is jammed. - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste ''Zurück'' klemmt. The button Return is jammed - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste "Zurueck zum Hauptmenü" klemmt. The button "back to the Main Menue is jammed" - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste "E/S/(M) Fahrprogramm-Umschaltung" klemmt. The button E/S/(M) transmission mode switching" is jammed." - ISO/SAE reserved
Die Taste "AMG" klemmt. The button "AMG" is jammed. - ISO/SAE reserved
System Voltage Low - no sub type information
System Voltage High - no sub type information
Battery Voltage Low - no sub type information
Battery Voltage High - no sub type information
The LIN bus 1 has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground - circuit short to ground
Lost communication with Telematics Gateway - missing message
Lost Communication With Cluster/CCN. Missing message. - missing message
Lost Communication With Vehicle Security Control Module (SKREEM/WCM). Missing message. - missing message
High Speed HU-CAN Communication Bus. BusOff. - bus off
Lost communication with ASBM_DB - missing message
Lost communication with UBFL205(CTRL_L) - missing message

Die Kommunikation mit der Schaltergruppe "DSR/Offroad-Programm" hat Funktionsstörung. The communication with switch group(I/O) "DSR/Offroad-Program" on CTRLC205 has a mail fiunction - ISO/SAE reserved
Lost communication with UBFR205(CTRL_L2) - missing message
